title: Lead Business Analyst
description:
You'll be a part of a digital transformation team, planning and leading large-scale integration projects across several functions of the company.

Responsibilities:

  • Own the end-to-end business analysis and solution lifecycle from ideation through delivery and post-implementation optimization.
  • Act as a strategic partner to senior business leaders, translating enterprise goals into coherent capability roadmaps and solution directions.
  • Provide thought leadership on digital enablement, platform consolidation, automation, and customer experience transformation.
  • Lead complex, ambiguous problem spaces involving multiple systems, stakeholders, and constraints.
  • Perform deep impact analysis across processes, data, integrations, risks, compliance, and operating models.
  • Define success metrics, KPIs, and value realization plans to ensure outcomes are measurable and tracked. 
  • Evaluate solution options (SaaS, COTS, custom build, integrations) and make clear, defensible recommendations.
  • Own change impact assessments, prioritization decisions, and scope governance.
  • Provide support to delivery teams throughout the SDLC, proactively resolving ambiguity and risks.
  • Define and oversee SIT and UAT strategies, ensuring solutions meet business intent and risk tolerance.
  • Support cutover, go-live readiness, and post-implementation reviews.
  • Mentor junior and mid-level Business Analysts.
  • Lead end-to-end process re-engineering initiatives, identifying opportunities for automation, digitization, and simplification.

Skills and Qualifications:

  • 8+ years of progressive experience in Business Analysis / Solution Analysis roles.
  • Proven track record delivering large-scale, enterprise or platform-based initiatives.
  • Experience working across digital, loyalty, CRM, customer platforms, data, or integration-heavy environments is desirable.
  • Expert-level capability in:
    o    Business & capability analysis
    o    Requirements engineering (functional & non-functional)
    o    Process modeling and optimization
    o    Impact and risk analysis
  • Solid understanding of:
    o    Modern application architectures
    o    Cloud and SaaS platforms
    o    APIs, integrations, and data flows
  • Able to engage architects and engineers as a credible solution partner, not just a requirements provider.
  • Demonstrated ability to influence senior leaders and drive alignment across diverse stakeholder groups.
  • Comfortable leading in ambiguity.
  • Experience working in Agile, hybrid, and waterfall environments.

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

Employment Agency License No.: 02C3423
